text:
Once upon a time, there was a little mouse named Toby. Toby loved going on adventures. One day, while rummaging through a trashcan, he discovered a tiny, shiny jewel. He decided it was too precious to keep. So, he quietly stole it back each night.

One night, Toby peeked into a magical mirror. A figure reflected back at him asked for the jewel back. Toby thought a little wizard lived there. He pondered a while before returning the jewel.

The mirror waved goodbye. Then Toby had the most amazing dream. In a kingdom far, far away, there lived a princess who could only open doors with a glittering diamond necklace.

So Toby remembered the diamond. He traveled there, and she gave back the jewel.

They fell in love. They lived happily ever after.

Toby learned that being honest brings more joy. They hadn't stolen it. They had found it.

And so ended Toby's adventure.<|endoftext|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|><|pad|>
